wikitext.*:
===Pokémon: Twilight Wings=== [[File:Bea Twilight Wings.png|thumb|250px|Bea in [[Pokémon: Twilight Wings]]]] Bea briefly debuted in ''[[TW01|Letter]]'', where she battled [[Leon]] in a [[Pokémon League]] tournament and lost, this specific battle is the starting point for several events shown in the series. She was later seen on a mountain with a {{p|Rhydon}}. In ''[[TW02|Training]]'', Bea was revealed to have traveled to the [[Wild Area]] to train after her loss to Leon. She and her Pokémon eventually got trapped in a cave while taking shelter from rain, but they later managed to find another exit. In ''[[TW03|Buddy]]'', [[Hop]] watched her match with Leon on television. In ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', she gave her thoughts about Leon in an interview. In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', she was seen eating in a café with her Machop and two {{tc|Lass}}es after receiving an invitation letter for the [[Galarian Star Tournament]]. She was later seen at [[Wyndon Stadium]], walking out onto the field for the tournament's opening ceremony. ====Pokémon==== Bea keeps all of her Pokémon in [[Ultra Ball]]s. {{anchor|Machamp 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Machamp |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Machamp Twilight Wings.png |epnum=TW01 |epname=Letter |vajp=List of Japanese voice actors{{!}}Masaaki Ihara |vajpnote=TW01 |vajp2=Tsuguo Mogami |vajp2note=TW02 |desc={{p|Machamp}} is Bea's first known Pokémon. It was used in her battle in a Pokémon League tournament against [[Leon]], but lost to his {{TP|Leon|Charizard}}. It later trained alongside her and her other Pokémon in the [[Wild Area]]. It reappeared in ''[[TW03|Buddy]]'', where it was seen on television. None of Machamp's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Machop |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Machop Twilight Wings.png |epnum=TW02 |epname=Training |vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima |vaen=List of English voice actors{{!}}Laura Post |desc={{p|Machop}} is Bea's second known Pokémon. It was seen training with her and her other Pokémon in the [[Wild Area]]. It is very caring towards her, such as when it handed out a chocolate bar to her when she was feeling down. Machop appears again in ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]''. None of Machop's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Machoke |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Machoke Twilight Wings.png |epnum=TW02 |epname=Training |vajp=Tsuguo Mogami |desc={{p|Machoke}} is Bea's third known Pokémon. It was seen training with her and her other Pokémon in the [[Wild Area]], though it was fairly fatigued every time they train. None of Machoke's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Sirfetch'd |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Sirfetch'd Twilight Wings.png |epnum=TW07 |epname=Sky |vajp= |desc={{p|Sirfetch'd}} is seen at Bea's side during an interview at her dojo.
